title: hypericum maculatum subsp. immaculatum
intro: Hypericum maculatum subsp. immaculatum is a subspecies of the St. John's Wort plant, known for its distinctive leaves and flowers. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of hypericin and hyperforin, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hypericum maculatum subsp. immaculatum include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support mental health and well-being.
